title: Towards Efficient Nitrite-to-Ammonia Conversion: DFT-Guided Design of Single-Atom Catalysts on Defective Boron Phosphide
abstract:
Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys., 2026, Accepted Manuscript
Aoxue Hu, Zhepei Yan, Yongfan Zhang, Shuping Huang, Jiehua Hu
Ammonia is a promising zero-carbon energy carrier, yet conventional production via the Haber–Bosch process is energy-intensive and high in emissions. Electrochemical nitrite reduction to ammonia (NO2RR) offers a sustainable alternative...
relevance_reason: DFT-guided catalyst design with explicit atomic structures; satisfies (a) explicit atoms, (b) DFT calculations, (c) application to catalysis.
